text.title: Prompt Engineering — Evaluation and Debugging — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the artefact shape this methodology produces.

example.code:
## Test Case Template
**ID:** TC-001 **Description:** [What this tests] **Input:** [Test input] **Expected Output:** [What should happen] **Actual Output:** [What happened] **Result:** PASS/FAIL **Notes:** [Any observations]
example.note: Worked example sourced from the prompt-engineering-evaluation v1 methodology.
